overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a nighttime walk through a futuristic downtown district. The scene features a massive illuminated golden hexagonal building facade, wet reflective streets with neon underglow on vehicles, and an elevated highway structure overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with neon traffic and elevated highway

events.description: futuristic sports car with pink neon underglow speeds through the intersection
white delivery van crosses the intersection from right to left
yellow SUV and red sports car pass through the crosswalk area

agents.ego_description: standing stationary at the crosswalk observing the flow of futuristic traffic

entered.detail: massive building facade with illuminated golden hexagonal panels reaching skyward
concrete overpass with support beams spanning across the street overhead
multi-story building with illuminated windows and modern glass facade
wet asphalt surface reflecting cyan and pink neon lights from vehicles and street lighting

segments.scene_description: Stationary view at a futuristic city intersection at night, with a massive golden hexagonal tower dominating the right side. Multiple futuristic vehicles with neon underglow pass through the intersection on wet reflective asphalt, while an elevated highway structure looms overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from intersection crosswalk to covered sidewalk

events.description: character begins walking forward across the zebra-striped crosswalk
crosses the street and steps onto the concrete sidewalk under the elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide intersection toward the golden illuminated building, following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with dark clothing walking ahead toward the sidewalk

entered.detail: paved pedestrian walkway with yellow tactile paving strip along the edge
red and yellow striped concrete barriers separating sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the stationary position and walks across the zebra crosswalk, transitioning from the open intersection to the sidewalk. The golden hexagonal building looms closer on the right as the camera follows a pedestrian ahead onto the concrete walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk alongside illuminated golden facade

events.description: camera turns right to follow the sidewalk parallel to the golden hexagonal wall
NCPD police car with holographic display becomes visible parked on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beside the illuminated golden wall, passing other pedestrians and observing the street

notable_agents.action: NCPD police car parked on the street with blue holographic text display on the side

entered.detail: futuristic police vehicle with glowing blue holographic text reading 'NCPD POLICE' on the side
floating digital billboard displaying colorful graphics above the street
yellow-topped concrete dividers lining the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along the narrow sidewalk under the elevated highway, with the massive illuminated golden hexagonal wall dominating the right side. The wet concrete reflects the golden light. An NCPD police car is parked on the left with holographic displays, while distant skyscrapers with neon signage are visible ahead through the urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, bustling city intersection into the narrow, illuminated corridor of a futuristic urban canyon. It begins with a stationary view of a massive golden hexagonal tower overlooking wet, reflective asphalt where vehicles with neon underglow glide beneath an elevated highway. As the camera begins to move, it crosses a zebra walkway and transitions from the open street onto a concrete sidewalk, drawing closer to the towering golden facade. The scene then shifts into a walk along the narrow path under the highway structure, where the golden light reflects off the damp ground and passes a parked NCPD police car with holographic displays. Finally, the perspective pushes forward through the urban canyon toward distant skyscrapers adorned with glowing neon signage.
